source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/Safety 접수자료 231219/3. Risk management/A-TCF-5-038 ADD FMEA Table Rev.00 231220.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: FMEA Report for ADD Digital faly panel X-ray detector risk management against EN ISO 14971, IEC 60601-1, EN 62366-1, software, and cybersecurity considerations.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports risk management documentation by identifying hazards, hazardous situations, risk controls, verification references, and residual risk acceptability for ADD.
keyPoints: Document No. A-TCF-5-038, Revision No. Rev. 2, revision date September 15, 2023.
Revision 2 was due to addition of components: Power adapter and ethernet cable.
Risk management references EN ISO 14971(2019) and IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013.
Overall residual risks are stated to be acceptable after implementation and verification of risk control measures.
Usability risks under EN 62366-1:2015 and cybersecurity risks for WiFi login and encryption are included.

entities.name: Digital faly panel X-ray detector
entities.evidence: Product Name,:,Digital faly panel X-ray detector

entities.name: Aspen Imaging Healthcare Inc.
entities.evidence: The Aspen Imaging Healthcare Inc. figured out the intended purpose and the characteristics related to the safety of the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

concepts.name: Risk management process
concepts.evidence: 4.2,Risk Management Process for ME Equipment or ME Systems,A,See Risk Management Report (Doc. No. A-TCF-5-037).

concepts.name: Essential performance
concepts.evidence: Manufacturer shall identify which functions are Essential Performance.

concepts.name: Expected service life
concepts.evidence: The ADD is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.

concepts.name: Single fault condition
concepts.evidence: Single Fault Condition for ME Equipment,A,"1. Clause 8.1 b Fundamental rule of protection against electric shock.

concepts.name: Residual risk acceptability
concepts.evidence: After all risk control measures have been implemented and verified, the residual risks within the Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector is reduced in the acceptable region

concepts.name: Use error
concepts.evidence: The user cannot find the safety information. The user does not understand the precautions.

concepts.name: Cybersecurity authentication and encryption
concepts.evidence: Transmission data is protected by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: The document is an FMEA Report.
Revision 2 was due to addition of Power adapter and ethernet cable components.
evidence.evidenceText: 2,2023.09.15,Revision due to addition of components (Power adapter & ethernet cable)

evidence.claim: The product name is Digital faly panel X-ray detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Product Name,:,Digital faly panel X-ray detector

evidence.claim: The document lists EN ISO 14971(2019) and IEC 60601-1:2006/AMD1:2013 as standards.
ADD is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD is designed for a service life of approximately 5 years. Refer to Life cycle report (Doc. No. A-TCF-5-057)

evidence.claim: The ADD has data cable, ethernet cable, AC power cord, Trigger cable, and USB cable.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD has the data cable, ethernet cable, AC power cord, Trigger cable, USB cable.

evidence.claim: The ADD has a rechargeable battery.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD has the rechargeable battery.

evidence.claim: The ADD has the rechargeable battery and power supply box or power adapter.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD has the rechargeable battery and power supply box(or power adapter).

evidence.claim: The ADD does not produce diagnostic or therapeutic X-radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: The ADD doesn't produce the x-radiation for diagnostic or therapeutic purposes.

evidence.claim: Software development and validation are stated to be in compliance with IEC 62304.
evidence.evidenceText: Software development process was established in compliance with IEC 62304 and software validation was perform.

evidence.claim: The ADD transmits data from the device to the PC.
evidence.evidenceText: Data transmission is made from the device to the PC.

evidence.claim: Electromagnetic compatibility is addressed with EMC testing and user manual information.
evidence.evidenceText: There is no unacceptable risk as the EMC test has satisfied basic safety in normal condition and single fault condition and we provide information on electromagnetic compatibility in user manual.

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity controls include restricting random access with ID and password for wireless network connection.
evidence.evidenceText: Restrict random access by setting id / pw when connecting to Wireless network

evidence.claim: Cybersecurity controls include transmission data encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, and WPAPSK+TKIP.
evidence.evidenceText: Protect the transmission data by applying encryption such as WPA, WPAPSK, WPA2, WPA2PSK, WPAPSK+TKIP, etc.

evidence.claim: Overall residual risks are determined to be acceptable.
evidence.evidenceText: Finally, the overall residual risks are determined to be acceptable through the waning, operating method and adverse event reporting.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority or jurisdiction is not identified in the source text; authoritySignal is only 'general'.
Source path filename includes 'Rev.00 231220', but the document text states Revision No. Rev. 2 and revision date September 15, 2023.
Product evidence is inconsistent or unclear: header gives Model Name ADD, while overall residual risk text refers to Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector (IODR1417, IODR1717).
OCR or spreadsheet extraction quality contains typographical errors such as 'Digital faly panel', 'hazzards', 'measeres', and 'waning'.
